get.summary: List source files of a package.
get.description: Get a list of source files belonging to a package.

parameters: Bad Request" error (400) if it is set to `1` and the package exists.

parameters.name: extension
parameters.description: List source files with the given extension.

parameters.name: lastworking
parameters.description: Show sources of the last mergeable sources in case of conflicting changes.

parameters.name: linkrev
parameters.description: Show sources of the specified linked revision in the base package.

parameters.name: meta
parameters.description: Set to `1` to show only the metadata file (`_meta`) in the list of files.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: Use with `view=products`. Limit the product view to a given product.

parameters.name: rev
parameters.description: Show sources of the specified revision.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
Specify which information about a package should be returned.

* `cpio`: Stream all package files as cpio.
* `getmultibuild`: List multibuild packages.
* `info`: Show source version, md5sums and build description files, among other information.
   See this [other endpoint](#/TODO) for details.
* `issues`: Show all tracked issues for this package.
* `products`: Show all products of a package (works only on `_product` or `000product` packages).
* `productrepositories`: Show all repositories used in product definitions (or a given product).

parameters.name: withlinked
parameters.description: Set to `1` to show all used packages (in case of multiple link indirections) in linkinfo information.

200.description:
OK. The request has succeeded.

XML Schema used for body validation: [directory.xsd](../schema/directory.xsd). This schema is not used in the following cases:
* view=cpio
* view=issues
* view=products
* view=productrepositories

With Parameter view=issues.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<package project="project_1" name="package_1">
  <issue change="kept">
    <created_at>2008-11-18 16:47:00 UTC</created_at>
    <updated_at>2020-02-24 13:01:11 UTC</updated_at>
    <name>446164</name>
    <tracker>bnc</tracker>
    <label>boo#246064</label>
    <url>https://bugzilla.test.com/show_bug.cgi?id=246064</url>
    <state>CLOSED</state>
    <summary>AUDIT-0: obs-server: /usr/bin/sign</summary>
    <owner>
      <login>user_1</login>
      <email>user_1@test.com</email>
      <realname>John Doe</realname>
    </owner>
  </issue>
</package>
